type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in flared acid gas. Activity of the injection facility was limited to recuperate costs of injecting acid gas from the Mitsue Gas Plant

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In previous years, Mitsue GP 10-30 did not include the Mitsue Wplant 02/10-30; this was erroneous as Mitsue Wplant 02/10-30 emissions are emitted within Mitsue GP 10-30 fence-line, that is to say the facilities are non-unique. In 2021 Mitsue GP 10-30 included Mitsue Wplant 02/10-30 increasing emissions as reported to NPRI.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fuel allocation was completed differently in 2022. In 2021, fuel from the water plant side and the gas plant side was combined and fuel was allocated to both water plant side and gas plant side equipment. In 2022, after conversations with operations, water plant fuel and gas plant fuel were kept separate and allocated to each sides respective equipment. Result is a distribution to cleaner burning equipment.
